title: US PPI Forecast Snapshot — Composite Calibrated Bridge Nowcast v2.5 Enhanced
summary: June 2026 PPI forecast refreshed July 10: Headline 0.0% MoM, Core +0.2% MoM. VIX 15.78 confirms Normal regime. Energy reversed sharply in June — Brent fell ~23% from early-June highs to ~$73 as Hormuz fears eased and OPEC+ added supply, before rebounding to $75.6 in early July. ISM Prices Paid cooled to 73.0 but remains strongly inflationary for core goods. Services stickiness anchored by ECI +0.30% monthly proxy. Net: energy drag offsets core persistence, headline flat, core sticky.
baseCase: Headline PPI 0.0% MoM, Core PPI +0.2% MoM. Energy composite -4.5% as gasoline/diesel/jet fuel all reverse post-Hormuz normalization. Core goods +0.5% supported by ISM Prices Paid at 73.0 and elevated metals. Services +0.22% via ECI labor cost proxy. Intermediate demand uplift +0.2 ppt.

release.name: PPI
release.thesis: Energy reverses sharply after May's +1.1% headline spike — Brent fell ~23% in June on Hormuz normalization and OPEC+ supply increases. ISM Prices Paid cooled to 73.0 but remains inflationary for core goods. ECI +0.30% monthly proxy keeps services sticky. Net: headline flat on energy mean-reversion, core persistent at +0.2%.

scenarios.label: Base Case — Energy Reversal, Core Sticky
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI 0.0% MoM, Core PPI +0.2% MoM. Energy drag from -4.5% composite offsets core goods +0.5% and services +0.22%. ISM 73.0 keeps manufacturing input costs elevated but cooling.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Fed remains data-dependent. 10Y yield holds 4.20-4.35%. DXY stable ~101. Equities grind higher with tech outperforming as rates stay contained.
scenarios.invalidation: ISM Prices Paid re-accelerates above 80; WTI snaps back above $85/bbl

scenarios.label: Hot Case — Core Stickier Than Expected
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI +0.3% MoM, Core PPI +0.4% MoM. Energy falls less than spot suggests due to contract lag. ISM Prices Paid stays firm. Freight rates surge into Q3 peak season.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Hawkish repricing risk. Fed dots shift toward hike by Q4. 2Y Treasury tests 4.70%. Cyclicals outperform; growth/multiples compress.
scenarios.invalidation: Energy crash deepens; China demand disappoints; wholesale margins compress

scenarios.label: Cool Case — Deeper Energy Drag
scenarios.outcome: Headline PPI -0.3% MoM, Core PPI +0.1% MoM. Energy fully normalizes post-Hormuz with gasoline down double digits. Dollar strength crushes import prices. Core goods soften as ISM cools.
scenarios.marketReadthrough: Risk-on. Rate-cut bets resurface for Q4. Small-caps and REITs outperform. Yield curve steepens.
scenarios.invalidation: Labor costs re-accelerate (ECI Q2 >1.0%); freight spike on hurricane season

setups.trigger: WTI fails $70 support post-OPEC+ build; RSI < 50 on daily
setups.invalidation: WTI closes above $78 on weekly; Hormuz re-closes

setups.trigger: 10Y yield >4.35% on soft PPI print; curve steepening signal
setups.invalidation: Core PPI >+0.35% with ISM Prices Paid >75; Fed Warsh hawkish pivot

setups.trigger: DXY breaks below 100 on disinflation; real yields compress
setups.invalidation: DXY rallies >103 on safe-haven bid; 10Y real yield >2.0%

watchItems.label: ISM Prices Paid (June)
watchItems.note: Above 60 = strong core goods signal. Cooled from 82.1 but still inflationary.

watchItems.label: EIA Weekly Petroleum (Jul 9)
watchItems.note: Crude rebounded early July but June average remains deeply lower. Watch Cushing builds.

watchItems.label: BLS ECI Q2 2026
watchItems.note: Labor cost is single best services proxy. Q1 was +0.9% SA.

watchItems.label: Fed Funds Futures
watchItems.note: Warsh's hawkish dots (Jun 17) on hold after soft jobs. Jul 29 next FOMC.

keyDrivers: Energy sharp reversal: Hormuz reopening + OPEC+ quota hikes drove Brent -23% MoM in June; refined products lagging but gasoline supply cushion evaporated.
ISM Prices Paid sticky at 73.0: Down from 82.1 but still strongly inflationary for core goods; steel/aluminum/copper all elevated.
ECI labor cost anchoring services: Q1 +0.9% SA (+0.30% monthly proxy) keeps Other Services PPI elevated; Q2 release Jul 31 critical.
Freight rates firming into Q3: DAT spot dry van ~$3.02/mi in June; produce season + cross-border demand tightening capacity.
Dollar strength capping import prices: DXY ~100.9 up ~3.5% YoY; offsets some core goods pressure via cheaper imports.
risks: Upside — Iran ceasefire frays: Any Hormuz shipping disruption snaps energy prices higher; distillate stocks at multi-year low amplifies shock.
Upside — Steel/tariff escalation: EU CBAM + US Section 232 at 50%; HRC $1,140/ton at multi-year highs; mills prioritizing contract over spot.
Downside — Demand destruction: Gasoline pump >$4.00 nationwide; consumer credit delinquencies rising; retail sales could crack.
Downside — Hurricane season: LNG export disruption could crash natural gas; refinery outages spike RBOB/ULSD temporarily.
